title: Ancient Warfare 3 Worksites
body:
This mod brings Ancient Warfare 2 worksite blocks to modern minecraft.

It currently includes the following blocks:

Crop farm: can farm any crop plant

Tree farm:  can farm trees

Quarry:  creates big holes in the ground

Fish farm:  farms fish & other sea treasures. or junk.

All farms are powered with mechanical energy. They have a gui to set bounds & access inventory.



I plan to add the other AW2 worksites in the future too.
